hero.headline: I build agent systems that do real work.
hero.sub: Voice agents that answer phones. An agent team that ships code. Pipelines that cut manual prospecting by 80%. I design multi-agent systems end-to-end, and I pick the stack per problem — not per habit.

about: I'm an AI engineering student at Esprit in Tunis, and a freelance software engineer for a Paris B2B SaaS, where I ship backend, AI, and frontend features across a multi-tenant sales-outreach platform.

My work centers on multi-agent systems: give each agent one narrow job, wire them together, then measure whether the whole thing actually saves someone time. The numbers I care about are boring on purpose — hours not spent, tickets not touched, reports nobody had to write.
Away from the keyboard: scout leader with the Tunisian Scouts, JCI member. Arabic, French, English — pick one.
